ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Sample identifier from the source data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the article (e.g., Politics, Sports, Entertainment) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the article was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "document_length" INTEGER /* Length of the full article in characters */,
  "shortened_document_length" INTEGER /* Length of the summarized article in characters */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the article has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments the article has received */,
  "read_time" REAL /* Estimated time to read the full article */,
  "read_time_summary" REAL /* Estimated time to read the summarized article */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A calculated score based on views, shares, and comments */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the article content (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last updated */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the article is featured */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Politics, Sports, Entertainment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., BBC News, CNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source's website */,
  "rating" REAL /* A rating for the source based on reliability and trustworthiness */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the source is trusted */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the source's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the author publishes articles */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the author is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Editor, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "can_edit_roles" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can edit other user roles */,
  "can_manage_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can manage content */,
  "can_generate_reports" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can generate reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, banned) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of user preferences (e.g., notification settings, default views) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
